title: Settings
subtitle: Manage device name, shortcuts, sync strategy, and version info.

basic.title: Basic
basic.deviceNameHelper: The name other devices see on the local network.
basic.receiveDirHelper: Files received over the local network are saved here.

screenshot.label: Screenshot shortcut
screenshot.helper: Select an area and copy it to the clipboard.

quickSend.label: Quick send
quickSend.helper: Pick a file and send it to the most recent device.

autoSync.label: Enable auto-sync
autoSync.helper: Automatically sync Prompts with other devices when online.

saveHistory.label: Save transfer history
saveHistory.helper: Keep transfer records in the local database for 30 days.

encryptSensitive.label: Encrypt sensitive Prompts
encryptSensitive.helper: Add extra encryption for Prompts containing keys/tokens.

about.title: About
about.downloadCompleted: Download complete—the app will restart when you proceed.
about.noAsset: No installer found for your platform. Please download it manually from GitHub Releases.
